Global Job Market: AI Exposure by Country 全球就业市场：AI职业暴露度 Methodology方法论 GitHub

This visualization maps AI exposure scores across 12 countries using ISCO-08 as a standardized backbone. Observed AI Exposure is computed from each country's own Claude usage data (Anthropic Economic Index V4, Nov 2025). Theoretical AI Exposure assesses AI's technical capability for each occupation. Each rectangle represents an occupation; size indicates job volume. Switch countries using the selector to explore how AI exposure varies across labor markets.

此可视化映射AI暴露分数跨越12个国家，使用ISCO-08作为标准化骨干。实测AI暴露度由各国自身的Claude使用数据计算（Anthropic经济指数V4，2025年11月）。理论AI暴露度评估AI对每个职业的技术能力。每个矩形代表一个职业；尺寸表示工作数量。使用选择器切换国家，探索AI暴露度在全球劳动力市场中的变化。

About global mapping & data sources关于全球映射与数据来源
Global Data Coverage: 12 countries across multiple regions, using standardized occupation classifications (ISCO-08 for international mapping).

Data Quality Grades: Grade assigned based on completeness of occupational data, coverage of the labor force, and data recency. A=excellent, B+=very good, B=good, C=fair.

US-to-Global Mapping: Theoretical and Observed AI Exposure scores are trained on US labor market data. For non-US countries, these scores represent estimated exposure based on occupational characteristics mapped via SOC→ISCO crosswalk. Pay, Education, and Outlook data are sourced locally where available; null values indicate data not available for that country.

Exposure Metrics:
• Theoretical AI Exposure: LLM-scored potential for AI to automate/augment each occupation (0-10)
• Observed AI Exposure: Real Claude API usage patterns reflecting actual AI deployment (0-10)

Data Sources: See each country's info badge for local source attribution.
全球数据覆盖：12个国家遍及多个地区，使用标准化职业分类（ISCO-08用于国际映射）。

数据质量等级：根据职业数据的完整性、劳动力覆盖率和数据时效性分配等级。A=优秀，B+=很好，B=好，C=中等。

美国到全球映射：理论AI暴露度和实测AI暴露度是在美国劳动力市场数据基础上训练的。对于非美国国家，这些分数代表基于SOC→ISCO交叉匹配的职业特征估计暴露度。薪资、教育和就业前景数据在有可用数据时来自当地；空值表示该国无数据。

暴露度指标：
• 理论AI暴露度：LLM评分的AI自动化/增强各职业的潜力（0-10）
• 实测AI暴露度：反映实际AI部署的Claude API使用模式（0-10）

数据来源：查看每个国家的信息徽章了解当地来源属性。
